response:
Yes, Tionne Watkins and Park So-yeon have both been members of a girl group. 

- **Tionne Watkins** was a member of the girl group **TLC**, which was formed in Atlanta, Georgia in 1990. She was part of the original line-up with Lisa "Left Eye" Lopes and Rozonda "Chilli" Thomas.
- **Park So-yeon** was a member of the South Korean girl group **T-ara**, which she led as the main vocalist. She is best known for her role as the former main vocalist in T-ara.

Both were part of girl groups, though they originated from different countries and musical backgrounds.
